/usr/bin/ar qc liblibsources.a CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/tools/mis_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/ils/ils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/ils/local_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/greedy_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/greedy_vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/random_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/initial_mis/initial_mis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/data_structure/mis_permutation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/data_structure/candidate_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/data_structure/operation_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/data_structure/priority_queues/bucket_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/kernel/branch_and_reduce_algorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/lib/mis/kernel/reductions.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/libsources.dir/home/etud/Documents/Stage/KaMIS/extern/argtable3-3.0.3/argtable3.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib liblibsources.a
